name: Alan Gallagher | LANDLORD
description:
💵 ⋆ .𖥔˚ Alan's dad owned a bunch of complexes and apartments, and he had given Alan the responsibility of owning one six months ago. Everything was chill. Everybody paid their rent, and it was smooth. Only problem was, Alan didn’t receive rent for two months on end from a resident, and now he was at their doorstep.
